title: Company Registration in Bangalore
description: Company registration in Bangalore by CA firm. Pvt Ltd, LLP, OPC. Local office at MG Road. RoC Bangalore. From ₹8,999. Virtual Auditor.
bodyText:
Company registration in Bangalore: Virtual Auditor operates a physical office in Bangalore at 7th Floor, Mahalakshmi Chambers, 29, MG Road, Bangalore, Karnataka 560001, providing in-person consultation, local RoC coordination, and Bangalore-specific regulatory expertise. We handle Pvt Ltd, LLP, OPC, public company, and all other entity registrations filed with RoC Bangalore. Since 2012, we have registered 500+ companies across India, with a significant presence in Bangalore. Quick Answer: Company Registration in Bangalore — Company registration in Bangalore by CA firm. Pvt Ltd, LLP, OPC. Local office at MG Road. RoC Bangalore. From ₹8,999. Virtual Auditor.

What is Company Registration?

Company Registration in Bangalore is a service offered by Virtual Auditor, an AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333) led by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV), specialising in company registration and professional services, from offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai since 2012.
Official References: MCA Portal ↗ · Startup India ↗

HEADING3: Why Virtual Auditor?

How does Virtual Auditor approach tax disputes differently? CA V. Viswanathan's four credentials — FCA (financial expertise), ACS (corporate governance), CFE (forensic investigation), IBBI RV (statutory valuation) — provide a multi-dimensional perspective that pure tax practitioners cannot match. Tax disputes often involve valuation questions, transfer pricing challenges, or governance failures — we address all angles simultaneously.

Our AI-assisted notice analyser extracts demand amounts, computes pre-deposit requirements, identifies limitation dates, and maps each issue to relevant case law from our appellate database. This data-driven approach produces stronger submissions backed by precedent rather than generic template replies.

With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, we appear in person before CIT(A), ITAT, GST Appellate Tribunal, and Advance Ruling authorities across South and West India. Physical presence at hearings makes a measurable difference in outcomes.

Beyond the immediate dispute, we provide ongoing advisory to prevent recurrence — restructuring transactions to be tax-efficient, implementing robust documentation practices, and establishing transfer pricing policies that withstand scrutiny.

HEADING2: Our Bangalore Office

Walk-in: Available by appointment, Monday-Saturday 10:00 AM - 6:00 PM.

RoC Bangalore: Kendriya Sadan, 2nd Floor, Koramangala, Bangalore 560034

HEADING2: Why Register in Bangalore?

Bangalore is India's startup capital — the highest concentration of VC-funded companies, 50+ unicorns, and the world's 4th largest tech cluster. Home to NASSCOM, STPI, IISC, and multiple SEZs (Electronic City, Whitefield, Manyata). Every major VC (Sequoia, Accel, Matrix, Lightspeed) has a Bangalore presence. The Karnataka government's Startup Policy provides: seed funding up to ₹50 lakhs, patent cost reimbursement, and marketing support. Most Bangalore startups register as Private Limited Companies to enable equity funding — making Pvt Ltd registration the most popular entity type in the city.

Registration is day one. We provide: statutory audit, annual ROC filings (AOC-4, MGT-7), GST return filing, TDS compliance, board resolution drafting, and — when you raise funding — FEMA/FDI compliance and share valuation by IBBI Registered Valuer (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333). One firm, Bangalore office, full lifecycle support.

HEADING2: People Also Ask

HEADING3: Best CA firm for company registration in Bangalore?

Virtual Auditor is a practicing CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm with a physical office in Bangalore at MG Road. Unlike aggregators, we provide: post-registration compliance, statutory audit, FEMA/FDI support, and share valuation — from the same team that registers your company. Phone: +91 95139 39333.

HEADING3: How to register a startup in Bangalore?

Step 1: Decide entity type (Pvt Ltd recommended for fundable startups). Step 2: Get DSC and DIN. Step 3: Reserve name via SPICe+. Step 4: File incorporation with MCA. Step 5: Open bank account. Step 6: Apply for DPIIT Startup India recognition. Virtual Auditor handles the complete process from our Bangalore office.

HEADING3: ⚡ How Virtual Auditor Delivers This Differently

Physical office presence near RoC offices enables direct filing coordination. Our compliance calendar tracks every post-registration deadline for companies in your city. Same team handles registration, annual compliance, tax planning, and when you raise funding — FEMA/FDI compliance and share valuation by IBBI Registered Valuer.

Free 30-minute consultation with CA V. Viswanathan, FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV. No obligation.

HEADING2: Recent Engagement — How We Helped
Context: a group of 4 co-founders launching an AI-powered fintech startup in Bangalore.
Challenge: The founders needed to incorporate quickly to sign a term sheet with an angel investor, but had complex requirements — one NRI director, customised Articles of Association with vesting clauses, and simultaneous DPIIT startup recognition for tax benefits.
Our approach: We handled end-to-end incorporation using SPICe+ (INC-32), securing DSC for all 4 directors including the NRI (using foreign address attestation), drafted customised MOA/AOA with founder vesting and anti-dilution provisions, and filed DPIIT recognition immediately post-incorporation.
Outcome: Certificate of Incorporation received in 6 working days. PAN/TAN/GST registration allotted simultaneously through SPICe+. DPIIT recognition approved within 48 hours of incorporation. The angel round closed within 3 weeks of engagement.
This engagement illustrates Virtual Auditor's approach to company registration in bangalore — combining regulatory expertise with practical execution to deliver results within the client's timeline.
HEADING2: When Is Company Registration in Bangalore Not Required?
Company registration in Bangalore may not be required when: (a) a sole proprietorship or partnership structure suffices for your current operations, (b) an LLP would be more suitable given your compliance and tax requirements, (c) you already have a company registered elsewhere and need only a branch or additional place of business in Bangalore, or (d) a contract or freelance arrangement meets your immediate needs without entity formation. ROC Bangalore serves Karnataka.
If you are unsure whether your situation requires company registration in bangalore, contact us for a free preliminary assessment. We will advise you honestly — including telling you if you do not need our services.
HEADING2: Documents Required
The following documents are needed to initiate the company registration in bangalore process:
PAN card and Aadhaar of all proposed directors/partners/members, passport-size photographs, proof of registered office address (rent agreement + NOC + utility bill, or ownership proof), Digital Signature Certificate (DSC) for all directors/designated partners, Director Identification Number (DIN) or application for allotment, draft constitutional document (MOA/AOA/LLP Agreement/Trust Deed), declaration and consent from directors/partners (Form INC-9/DIR-2), and professional certificate from a practicing CA/CS/Advocate.
We provide a personalised document checklist after the initial consultation, tailored to your specific entity type and situation. Documents can be shared securely via email or our client portal.
HEADING2: What You Receive
Upon completion of the company registration in bangalore engagement, you will receive: Certificate of Registration/Incorporation from the relevant authority, PAN and TAN allotment (where applicable), certified copies of constitutional documents (MOA/AOA/LLP Agreement/Trust Deed), digital copies of all filed forms with acknowledgment receipts, and a post-registration compliance checklist with due dates for the first year.
All deliverables are reviewed by CA V. Viswanathan (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI RV) before release to ensure accuracy and regulatory compliance.
HEADING3: Updated for FY 2025-26
This service page reflects the latest regulatory requirements as of March 2026, incorporating changes from the Union Budget 2025, recent MCA notifications, CBDT/CBIC circulars, and RBI master directions applicable to company registration in bangalore. Virtual Auditor continuously monitors regulatory updates to ensure all advice and filings are current.
HEADING2: Timeline and Turnaround
Typical turnaround for company registration in bangalore: 5-15 working days from submission of complete documents. Name approval: 1-3 working days. SPICe+ incorporation: 3-6 working days after name approval. LLP incorporation: 5-8 working days. Complex registrations (Section 8 company, Nidhi, Producer Company): 10-15 working days due to additional approvals required.
Timelines assume prompt submission of complete documents and information. We provide a clear project timeline at the start of every engagement.
HEADING2: Who Needs Company Registration in Bangalore?
This registration is required for: (a) businesses seeking limited liability protection for promoters and directors, (b) startups planning to raise equity funding from investors (angel/VC/PE), (c) entities requiring a separate legal identity for contracts, property, and bank accounts, (d) businesses planning to scale operations across multiple states, (e) professionals or consultants seeking to formalise their practice into a body corporate, and (f) any person or group mandated by law to register under the applicable business structure.
HEADING2: Penalties for Non-Compliance
Non-registration or delayed compliance can result in: (a) personal liability of promoters for all business debts without limited liability protection, (b) penalty of Rs 50,000-1,00,000 for carrying on business without registration where mandatory, (c) inability to enforce contracts or open business bank accounts, (d) additional fee of Rs 100/day for delayed filing of annual returns with MCA, and (e) striking off the company name for non-filing of annual returns for 2 consecutive years under Section 248.
Proactive compliance is always cheaper than penalty. Contact Virtual Auditor for a compliance health check to identify and address any gaps before they become liabilities.

faqs.q: How much does company registration cost in Bangalore?
faqs.a: All-inclusive from ₹8,999 for Pvt Ltd. Covers: DSC, DIN, name approval, SPICe+, MOA/AOA, PAN/TAN. No hidden charges. Government stamp duty included.
RoC Bangalore, located at Kendriya Sadan, 2nd Floor, Koramangala, Bangalore 560034. Virtual Auditor's Bangalore office coordinates with this RoC for all filings.

faqs.q: Do you have a physical office in Bangalore?
faqs.a: Yes. 7th Floor, Mahalakshmi Chambers, 29, MG Road, Bangalore, Karnataka 560001. Walk-in consultations available by appointment. Call +91 95139 39333 to schedule.

faqs.q: How long does registration take in Bangalore?
faqs.a: 5-15 working days. Bangalore-specific factors: MCA portal processing is national (not city-dependent), but local notarization, stamp duty, and address verification may vary.

faqs.q: Can I register an LLP in Bangalore?
faqs.a: Yes. LLP registration from ₹10,000. Filed with the Central Registration Centre (CRC). Post-registration compliance handled by our Bangalore office.
Yes. Annual filings, statutory audit, GST, TDS, board resolutions, and FEMA/FDI compliance (if you raise foreign investment) — all from our Bangalore office.
